desired_capability: Create a prompt-only local Codex skill that actively clarifies ambiguous user needs, distinguishes inference from confirmed requirements, and produces an implementation brief with risks and acceptance criteria.
target_user: local Codex user with vague engineering requests
triggers: When the user cannot clearly state the real problem at the start.
When multiple rounds of clarification are usually needed before implementation.
non_triggers: When the user already provides a complete technical specification.
must: Separate confirmed requirements from inferred needs.
Include risks, open decisions, and acceptance criteria.
Write all generated files under package/.
must_not: Do not include raw chat logs, provider payloads, credentials, or secrets.
